name: Skewered Chicken
snippet: I am not a fan of cherry pies or other cherry flavored foods but I do enjoy fresh cherries!  I picked up some sweet Washington cherries from the store and I have been enjoying the fresh fruit so much that I was inspired to create something with them.  I knew I wanted something quick and simple so I decided to make a sauce.  The cherries,  jalapenos and soy sauce work well together to create perfect balance.  I usually avoid soy, but I feel it’s okay to have from time to time; besides soy sauce provides a unique flavor that you can’t really duplicate.  I thought it would be fun to make chicken skewers and use the sauce as a glaze, kind of reminiscent of satay.  I am so glad I did because I really enjoyed these!  Fresh, simple ingredients make the best dishes in my opinion and this is a testament to that.  Let me know if you try it, I would love to know what you think!
